location: Dropped by Logur, the Beast Claw, a hostile NPC boss who roams the forested area south of the main road in Gravesite Plain, generally southeast/east of the Gravesite Plain Site of Grace (near the Pillar Path Waypoint grace). He wanders rather than staying put, so guides differ slightly on the exact compass direction.
tactics: Logur roams the woods rather than staying in a fixed spot — listen for a bird-like screech, or try visiting at night, to spot him faster.
He fights unarmored, so he has high poise and hits hard but is very vulnerable to strike-type/colossal weapons and lightning damage, which stagger him easily.
He can heal himself with a flask once mid-fight — keep pressure on to avoid giving him a second chance.
Bait out the end of his fast combo strings before punishing; he closes distance slowly, so kiting on Torrent or with ranged attacks works well.
lore: This weapon is fashioned from the claws of a flesh-eating beast, letting the wielder tear into enemies with feral slashing attacks no ordinary person could pull off. Its brutal, primal fighting style echoes a secretive claw technique associated with the Land of Shadow's horned warriors.

builds.name: Quality Bleed Brawler
builds.statFocus: Strength/Dexterity (quality) plus enough Arcane for bleed
builds.why: D/D scaling in both Strength and Dexterity rewards a balanced quality build, and the weapon's native 45 blood loss buildup plus the Savage Claws skill (rapid lunging flurry) turns quality investment into fast hemorrhage procs.
